name: lootman
description: Root Node tooling command surface for the LootMan mod.

scripts.package:clean: node tools/scripts/preflight.js package:clean && tsx packaging/scripts/cli.ts clean
scripts.package:clean:all: node tools/scripts/preflight.js package:clean:all && tsx packaging/scripts/cli.ts clean --all
scripts.package:clean:wsl-build: node tools/scripts/preflight.js package:clean:wsl-build && tsx packaging/scripts/cli.ts clean --wsl-build
scripts.package:build: node tools/scripts/preflight.js package:build && tsx packaging/scripts/cli.ts build
scripts.package:deploy: node tools/scripts/preflight.js package:deploy && tsx packaging/scripts/cli.ts deploy
scripts.package:undeploy: node tools/scripts/preflight.js package:undeploy && tsx packaging/scripts/cli.ts undeploy
scripts.test:packaging: node tools/scripts/preflight.js test:packaging && vitest run packaging/tests
scripts.test:tools: node tools/scripts/preflight.js test:tools && vitest run tools

author: EideeHi
